sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_pseudo_id) AS distinct_users_with_positive_engagement
FROM (
    SELECT user_pseudo_id
    FROM "GA4"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."EVENTS_20201225"
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2021 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM TO_DATE(event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN 1 AND 7
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM "GA4"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."EVENTS_20201225" e2
        WHERE e2.user_pseudo_id = e1.user_pseudo_id
          AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(e2.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2021 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(e2.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM TO_DATE(e2.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN 6 AND 7
          AND e2.event_params:engaged_session_event:int_value > 0
    )
)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM "GA4"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."GA4_OBFUSCATED_SAMPLE_ECOMMERCE"."EVENTS_20201225" e3
    WHERE e3.user_pseudo_id = e1.user_pseudo_id
      AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(e3.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2021 AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(e3.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 1 AND EXTRACT(DAY FROM TO_DATE(e3.event_date, 'YYYYMMDD')) BETWEEN 5 AND 6
      AND e3.event_params:engaged_session_event:int_value > 0
)

sql:
WITH purchases AS (
    SELECT
        s.fullVisitorId,
        s.visitId,
        h.productSKU,
        h.productName,
        h.quantity,
        h.price
    FROM
        "GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20170701" s
    LATERAL JOIN
        FLATTEN(input => s.hits) h
    WHERE
        h.eCommerceAction.actionType = 'purchase'
        AND h.eCommerceAction.productDetails IS NOT NULL
        AND h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.productName LIKE '%Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley%'
),
other_purchases AS (
    SELECT
        p.fullVisitorId,
        p.visitId,
        p.productSKU,
        p.productName,
        p.quantity,
        p.price
    FROM
        purchases p
    WHERE
        p.productName != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
)
SELECT
    op.productSKU,
    op.productName,
    SUM(op.quantity * op.price) AS total_revenue
FROM
    other_purchases op
GROUP BY
    op.productSKU,
    op.productName
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1

        h.eCommerceAction.actionType = 'purchase'
        AND h.eCommerceAction.productDetails IS NOT NULL
        AND h.eCommerceAction.productDetails.productName LIKE '%Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley%'
),
other_purchases AS (
    SELECT
        p.fullVisitorId,
        p.visitId,
        p.productSKU,
        p.productName,
        p.quantity,
        p.price
    FROM
        purchases p
    WHERE
        p.productName != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
)
SELECT
    op.productSKU,
    op.productName,
    SUM(op.quantity * op.price) AS total_revenue
FROM
    other_purchases op
GROUP BY
    op.productSKU,
    op.productName
ORDER BY
    total_revenue DESC
LIMIT 1

sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS year,
        EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        trafficSource:"source" AS source,
        SUM(totals:"transactionRevenue") AS total_revenue
    FROM 
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160916"
    WHERE 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) = 2017
    GROUP BY 
        year, month, source
)
SELECT 
    source,
    MAX(total_revenue) - MIN(total_revenue) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM 
    MonthlyRevenue
GROUP BY 
    source

FROM

GROUP BY

sql:
SELECT 
    v.visitorId,
    DATEDIFF(DAY, MIN(v.date), MIN(t.transaction_date)) AS days_elapsed,
    t.device_type
FROM 
    "GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160915" v
JOIN 
    "GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_SESSIONS_20160824" v2 ON v.visitorId = v2.visitorId
LEFT JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => TRY_CAST(v.totals AS VARIANT):transactions) t ON TRUE
WHERE 
    v.date BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
    AND v2.date BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
    AND t.transaction_id IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
    v.visitorId, t.device_type

sql:
SELECT 
    p.product_name,
    SUM(p.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM (
    SELECT 
        t.transaction_id,
        o.order_items.item_name AS product_name,
        o.order_items.quantity
    FROM 
        "GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_TRANSACTIONS_201707" t
    JOIN 
        "GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_ORDER_ITEMS_201707" o ON t.transaction_id = o.transaction_id
    WHERE 
        t.ecommerce_total_revenue > 0
        AND o.item_name ILIKE '%youtube%'
        AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%youtube%'
) p
GROUP BY 
    p.product_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 1
original_sql:
SELECT 
    p.product_name,
    SUM(p.quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM (
    SELECT 
        t.transaction_id,
        o.order_items.item_name AS product_name,
        o.order_items.quantity
    FROM 
        "GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_TRANSACTIONS_201707" t
    JOIN 
        "GA360.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE.GA_ORDER_ITEMS_201707" o ON t.transaction_id = o.transaction_id
    WHERE 
        t.ecommerce_total_revenue > 0
        AND o.item_name ILIKE '%youtube%'
        AND o.item_name NOT LIKE '%youtube%'
) p
GROUP BY 
    p.product_name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity DESC
LIMIT 1

sql:
SELECT 
    h.exitScreenName AS NextPage,
    MAX(totals.timeOnSite) AS MaxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_201701*"
JOIN 
    LATERAL FLATTEN(input => hits) h
WHERE 
    h.appInfo.exitScreenName LIKE '/home%'
    AND trafficSource.campaign LIKE '%Data Share%'
GROUP BY 
    h.exitScreenName
ORDER BY 
    COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1
original_sql:

    h.exitScreenName AS NextPage,
    MAX(totals.timeOnSite) AS MaxTimeOnHomePage
FROM 
    "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_201701*"

    h.appInfo.exitScreenName LIKE '/home%'

ORDER BY

sql:
WITH monthly_sessions AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', TO_DATE(date, 'YYYYMMDD')) AS month,
        fullVisitorId,
        SUM(COALESCE(totals:pageviews::NUMBER, 0)) AS total_pageviews,
        CASE WHEN MAX(COALESCE(totals:transactions::NUMBER, 0)) > 0 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non_purchase' END AS session_type
    FROM
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160601"
    WHERE
        date BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170731'
        AND totals:pageviews IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        month, fullVisitorId, session_type

    FROM
        "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160601"

SELECT 
    visitorId,
    MAX(DATEDIFF(DAY, MIN(visitStartTime), MAX(CASE WHEN device:"mobile"::BOOLEAN THEN visitStartTime END))) AS max_days_between_first_last_event

    "GA360"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GOOGLE_ANALYTICS_SAMPLE"."GA_SESSIONS_20160807"
GROUP BY 
    visitorId
